features/overview.title: Features Overview
features/overview.description: REAOPS provides a comprehensive set of tools for real estate professionals.

getting-started/intro.title: Introduction to REAOPS
getting-started/intro.description: REAOPS is an AI-powered real estate brokerage assistant built for brokers and agents. It provides natural language access to property management, marketing generation, calendar scheduling, follow-up drafting, and portfolio analysis — all through a Telegram bot or web chat.

getting-started/quick-start.title: Quick Start Guide
getting-started/quick-start.description: Get up and running with REAOPS in minutes.

getting-started/setup.title: REAOPS Setup
getting-started/setup.description: Welcome to the REAOPS setup guide.

user-guide/telegram.title: Using Telegram
user-guide/telegram.description: The Telegram bot is the primary way to interact with REAOPS.

workflows/workflow.title: Operational Workflows
workflows/workflow.description: This document covers core REAOPS workflows.
